title: potentilla reptans subvar. minor
intro: Potentilla reptans subvar. minor, also known as dwarf cinquefoil, is a subspecies of perennial herbaceous plant that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of dwarf cinquefoil include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat colds, sore throats, and other respiratory issues.
